# discord_stage_channel (Resource)

Manages a stage channel in a Discord guild.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_stage_channel" "town_hall" {
  server_id  = "123456789012345678"
  name       = "Town Hall"
  category   = "234567890123456789"
  bitrate    = 64000
  user_limit = 1000
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Channel name.
- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.

### Optional

- `bitrate` (Number) Bitrate (in bits) of the stage channel.
- `category` (String) Snowflake ID of the parent category channel.
- `position` (Number) Sorting position of the channel.
- `rtc_region` (String) Voice region id for the channel; null sets it to automatic.
- `sync_perms_with_category` (Boolean) When true, the channel's permission overwrites are synced to its parent category on create/update. Conflicts with explicit `discord_channel_permission` overwrites on the same channel.
- `user_limit` (Number) Maximum number of users allowed in the stage channel.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the channel.
